title: statice coriaria
intro: Statice coriaria, also known as sea lavender or sea rosemary, is a small, shrub-like flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and wounds due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Statice coriaria include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Statice coriaria can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
